---
description: "Use when planning or building a new app, adding a feature, adapting an existing app, or making multi-file behavioral changes. Covers clarification, planning, risk control, and incremental delivery."
name: "App Workflow"
---
# App Workflow

- Distinguish first between new build and existing-system adaptation.
- For new builds, clarify goal, users, scope, and success criteria before implementation.
- For existing systems, inspect current files, conventions, and data flow before changing code.
- Prefer a short plan for multi-step or multi-file tasks.
- Solve the smallest valuable version first.
- Verify behavior after each meaningful step instead of batching all risk to the end.
- When debugging, identify the likely root cause before editing code.
